title: MUCUNA PRURIENS
description: Mucuna pruriens (velvet bean) is a tropical legume that naturally contains L-DOPA, the direct precursor to dopamine. It's used for mood support, testosterone enhancement, and has traditional use in Ayurvedic medicine for vitality and reproductive health.

research.title: Mucuna pruriens and male fertility
research.summary: Research shows Mucuna improves sperm quality and testosterone levels in infertile men.

research.title: L-DOPA content and effects
research.summary: Studies demonstrate Mucuna pruriens effectively raises dopamine levels through its L-DOPA content.

sentiment.summary: Users report improved mood, motivation, and libido. Popular for natural dopamine support. Effects can be strong; some experience overstimulation.

dosage.label: Morning Dosing:
dosage.description: Best taken in morning due to stimulating effects.

sideEffects.label: Overstimulation:
sideEffects.description: Can cause agitation if dopamine raises too much.

sideEffects.label: Insomnia:
sideEffects.description: May disrupt sleep if taken late.

sideEffects.label: Drug Interactions:
sideEffects.description: Avoid with MAOIs and dopamine medications.

availability.label: Widely Available:
availability.description: Found in supplement stores and online.
